name: ByggPartner i Dalarna Holding AB (publ)
summary: ByggPartner i Dalarna Holding AB (publ) operates as a construction company. The company contacts various projects within housing, community, and commercial properties; and provides building services. It also undertakes various scaffolding projects primarily in housing and industry, as well as engages in the property development activities. The company was founded in 1992 and is headquartered in Borl√É¬§nge, Sweden.
